title: compact_block_proto_fields_are_accessible does not assert hash contents
description: In client.rs lines 277-291, the test constructs a CompactBlock with hash: vec\![0xab; 32] but only asserts block.hash.len() == 32, not the contents. The test oracle comment says it checks 'proto-generated struct layout', but a prost bug that zero-initializes bytes fields would pass the length check while silently dropping the content. Fix: add assert_eq\!(block.hash, vec\![0xab_u8; 32]) to verify that byte-vector fields round-trip their content, not just their length.
close_reason: P3/P4 deferred: below stopping threshold (P0=0, P1=0, SEC7 says STOP)
